author: Rafael Ferraz
summary: BitNet b1.58 ternary QAT + depth recurrence. 4 unique transformer blocks applied 6× per pass (24 effective layers), 12× at eval (free test-time compute). LSQ learnable quantization scale initialized from median(|W|). Muon+WD for matrix params. Sliding-window BPB eval (stride=64). ~62M unique params, ~14.2MB compressed artifact.
techniques: BitNet b1.58 ternary QAT with LSQ scale (arXiv:2402.17764, 2407.09527)
Depth recurrence: 4 unique × 6 train loops = 24 effective layers
Eval-time loop scaling: 12 loops at inference (free test-time compute)
Muon optimizer + weight decay (0.02) for matrix params
RoPE, GQA (16 heads / 4 KV heads), QK-Norm, ReLU², logit softcap
Residual mixing: x blended with initial embedding x0
notes: Results TBD pending H100 grant run. Approach validated on M1 Max 64GB: compression confirmed at ~14.2MB for 61.9M unique ternary params. Fill val_bpb, val_loss, artifact_mb, date from actual run logs before final PR.
